info.title: AIESS Management Tools
info.description: Schedule management, system configuration, and site config tools for the AIESS Energy Core agent.

get.description: Retrieves the full site configuration from DynamoDB including description, battery specs, PV arrays, grid limits, power limits, tariff, load profile, and location. Call this first to understand the site context.
Retrieves all current schedule rules from the IoT Named Shadow including priorities P4 through P9, system mode, and safety SoC limits. Always call this before modifying any rules.

sch.description: Schedule rules object with p_4 through p_9 arrays.

post.description: Creates or updates a schedule rule. Auto-tags source as AI. Priority must be 4 to 9. The rule_json is a JSON string with optimized format: id, a (action: t=type pw=power pid=use_pid soc=target maxp=max_power maxg=max_grid ming=min_grid str=strategy hth=high_threshold lth=low_threshold), c (conditions: ts=time_start te=time_end sm=soc_min sx=soc_max gpo=grid_operator gpv=grid_value gpx=grid_max), d (days), vf/vu (validity). Requires user confirmation.

rule_json.description: JSON string of the rule object.

post.description: Deletes a schedule rule by its rule ID and priority level. Requires user confirmation.

rule_id.description: The unique identifier of the rule to delete.

post.description: Sets the system operating mode to automatic, semi-automatic, or manual. Requires user confirmation.

mode.description: The operating mode: automatic, semi-automatic, or manual.

post.description: Sets the battery safety SoC limits at hardware level. soc_min between 1 and 50, soc_max between 50 and 100. Requires user confirmation.

soc_min.description: Minimum battery SoC percentage between 1 and 50.

soc_max.description: Maximum battery SoC percentage between 50 and 100.
